required_attributes.name: ean
required_attributes.title: EAN
required_attributes.seller_instructions: Please enter a valid GTIN/EAN (Global Trade Item Number). This serves as the basis for your product data and the corresponding offers. items without a GTIN or EAN cannot be created in the system.

required_attributes.name: title
required_attributes.title: Title
required_attributes.seller_instructions:
Include the most important information about the product in the title. Use a minimum of 20 and a maximum of 150 characters. Avoid keyword spam and unusual special characters. Avoid promotional language and remain factual. 
Recommended example: Sharp "R-982STWE" combi microwave with infrared grill

required_attributes.name: description
required_attributes.title: Description
required_attributes.seller_instructions:
Provide a neutral product description, in which you talk up the benefits of the product in order to explain its functions and properties, for example, to the customer.
 
 Not permitted are:
 - Information about prices, price recommendations, discounts,
 - Information about the shipping method,
 - Information about delivery times,
 - Details of warranty periods,
 - References to certificates or test seals,
 - Links, images, videos,
 - Contact details of your online shop,
 - Item condition.
Further information can be found in our product data guideline.

required_attributes.name: picture
required_attributes.title: Image
required_attributes.seller_instructions:
Provide a neutral product image, in which the item is isolated in front of a white background. Additional close-up product images are recommended.

Minimum size: 500px on the longest side
Recommended size: 1024px on the longest side
For convenient use of the search function on the product detail page, we recommend image sizes of at least 2048px on the longest side.

Not permitted are:
- Text, logos, graphics, or watermarks that are superimposed on the product images,
- Accessories that are not included must not be depicted,
- Placeholder images,
- Bordered images.

Accepted file formats:
- jpg, gif, svg, png, pdf

required_attributes.name: material_composition
required_attributes.title: Material composition
required_attributes.explanation: Material identification – mandatory field for all products containing 80% by weight of textile components
required_attributes.seller_instructions:
The EU Textile Regulation governs the designation of textile fibres and their labelling and fibre composition. All products containing at least 80% textile fibres by weight must be labelled accordingly.
For example, the following must be clearly labelled:
Clothing, blankets, furniture covers, umbrellas and parasols, floor coverings, mattress covers, covers on camping items, etc. in the following form:
80% cotton, 20% polyester
Material composition is a mandatory field. If the item does not require information concerning its material composition for legal reasons, “No information required” can be entered.

required_attributes.name: category
required_attributes.title: Category
required_attributes.seller_instructions:
Select a leaf category to assign your products: Products can only be assigned to the last level of a product world (leaf category).
Example:
Electronics & computers > Home electronics > TV, audio & video > TVs & accessories > TVs
In this example, the category "TVs" is the leaf category within the "Electronics & computers" section.

required_attributes.name: product_safety_contact
required_attributes.title: Manufacturer / EU Responsible Person
required_attributes.explanation:
From 13 December 2024, the General Product Safety Regulation (GPSR) will come into force, replacing the General Product Safety Directive. This regulation is intended to ensure the safety of products placed on the European market. 
In order to comply with the requirements regarding product safety information, the manufacturer's name (if based in the EU) / or EU Responsible Person, address, e-mail and telephone (optional) must be provided for each product offered.
required_attributes.seller_instructions:
Provide the manufacturer's name (if based in the EU) / name of the EU Responsible Person, registered (business) address, e-mail or contact page URL (including scheme, e.g.: https://), and telephone number (optional).

The addresses must contain (separated by a comma):
- Street name and number
- City / Town
- Postal code
- Country code (e.g. “DE” for Germany)
